narrative:
Centerville Pct (precinct in Gallia County) has 634 registered voters, with 51.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.8 percentage points.
